title: Running a way of life for local athlete
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - For the 21-year-old Mossel...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - For the 21-year-old Mossel Bay athlete, Jandri Snyders, being an athlete is everything.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - For the 21-year-old Mossel Bay athlete, Jandri Snyders, being an athlete is everything."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Training since she was a little girl, Snyders' love of and dedication to athletics stem from her parents' encouragement to join them on fun runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Although back then, I often ended up running away,\" she says jokingly.","html":"\"Although back then, I often ended up running away,\" she says jokingly."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"That encouragement led to her recent win of the 31st Momentum Optimum Meiringspoort half-marathon race, held in De Rust, where more than 3 000 athletes participated in the 12.5km and 21.1km races.","html":"That encouragement led to her recent win of the 31st Momentum Optimum Meiringspoort half-marathon race, held in De Rust, where more than 3 000 athletes participated in the 12.5km and 21.1km races."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Snyders told Mossel Bay Advertiser one of her most memorable and cherished moments was winning her second 21.1km race there.","html":"Snyders told Mossel Bay Advertiser one of her most memorable and cherished moments was winning her second 21.1km race there."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It felt so unreal and almost impossible, but I've learnt that with faith and perseverance, nothing truly is.\"","html":"\"It felt so unreal and almost impossible, but I've learnt that with faith and perseverance, nothing truly is.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"To celebrate her win, her family went out for pizza later that day. \"A simple but special memory,\" she calls it."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Snyders first began as a middle-distance runner, but over time developed a deep love of long-distance running. Currently training six days a week, every run pushes her to improve and grow stronger.","html":"Snyders first began as a middle-distance runner, but over time developed a deep love of long-distance running. Currently training six days a week, every run pushes her to improve and grow stronger."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jandri Snyders (front, left) in action during the half-marathon. Photo: Oakpics Photography","html":"Jandri Snyders (front, left) in action during the half-marathon. Photo: Oakpics Photography"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Throughout the years, running has taught Snyders more than just endurance - it has strengthened her mental health and built discipline, focus and resilience.","html":"Throughout the years, running has taught Snyders more than just endurance - it has strengthened her mental health and built discipline, focus and resilience."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In between her dedication to her chosen sport, Snyders is also studying towards a Bachelor of Accounting Sciences qualification through Unisa and volunteers at Goshen E-Academy, a school in Mossel Bay.","html":"In between her dedication to her chosen sport, Snyders is also studying towards a Bachelor of Accounting Sciences qualification through Unisa and volunteers at Goshen E-Academy, a school in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Her biggest challenge arises from juggling her studies, training and social life, but she has worked out a way of maintaining some balance through prayer and determination."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Snyders' days of rest are best spent in her family's company, complete with their Sunday tradition of enjoying an ice cream at The Point.","html":"Snyders' days of rest are best spent in her family's company, complete with their Sunday tradition of enjoying an ice cream at The Point."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Running isn't just a sport for me. It's a way of life, a journey of faith and a daily reminder that nothing is impossible.\"","html":"\"Running isn't just a sport for me. It's a way of life, a journey of faith and a daily reminder that nothing is impossible.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
